meta.description: 90-day human performance coaching platform. Custom landing page with built-in registration form replaces Fillout. Affine (forked, stripped) provides the Notion-like portal UI. Discord is the daily check-in interface. NeonDB is the data layer.
meta.architecture_summary: Landing page (Next.js) + Affine fork (portal UI) + Hono API (backend) + Discord.js bot + NeonDB + BetterAuth + Railway (API + bot) + Vercel (frontend)

confirmed_flow.description: The complete client journey from first touch to active program participant.

steps.action: Visits landing page — reads about FlowState, scrolls to registration form
Fills and submits registration form on landing page
Creates pending client record in DB. Shows thank you screen to client.
Sends coach a notification (email + in-portal): new registration pending approval
Reviews registration in coach admin portal. Can edit program_start_date. Clicks Approve.
Auto-provision fires: creates user account, generates temporary password, creates Discord channel, creates Affine workspace, seeds calendar events
Sends client a welcome email containing: portal login URL, their email as username, temporary password, Discord server invite link
Clicks portal link, logs in with temporary password, is prompted to set a new password
Joins Discord server via invite link in email. Bot detects join, matches Discord ID, assigns their private role and channel.
Sends welcome DM confirming their private check-in channel is ready
Daily check-in loop begins on program_start_date

confirmed_flow.chronotype_note: MEQ assessment is a later-phase feature. All clients default to chronotype = Intermediate on registration.

landing_page.purpose: Marketing page + registration form. Standalone page, no auth required.
landing_page.hosting: Vercel (same project as Affine frontend, different route)

portal_ui.purpose: Notion-like UI shell for client portal and coach admin. Document editor, grid views, page hierarchy.

stack.auth: BetterAuth — handles sessions, password reset, credential emails
stack.email: Resend (welcome emails, coach notifications, password setup) — free tier sufficient

ai.weekly_summaries: Anthropic Claude Sonnet (once per week per client only)

coach.description: Admin. Full access to all clients, approvals queue, intervention queue, master dashboard, templates, reports.

client.description: End user. Sees only their own workspace. Cannot access coach admin or other client data.

sections.content: Headline, subheadline, CTA button that scrolls to registration form
What FlowState is, who it's for, the 90-day program overview
Three phases: Month 1 Attention Architecture, Month 2 Flow State Engineering, Month 3 Identity & Integration
Simple 3-step visual: Register → Get approved → Start your program

sections.description: Embedded on the landing page. No redirect to a separate page.

fields.name: discord_user_id
fields.label: Discord ID
fields.helper: Your Discord username e.g. johndoe#1234 or johndoe

fields.name: preferred_start_date
fields.label: Preferred Start Date
fields.helper: We will do our best to accommodate this, though it is subject to final approval.

fields.name: key_changes
fields.label: Any key things you'd like to see change?

fields.name: short_term_goals
fields.label: What are you looking forward to learning or accomplishing in your first few days/weeks?

fields.name: long_term_goals
fields.label: Goals you hope to achieve in the long run

fields.name: goal_motivation
fields.label: Why are these goals important to you right now?

fields.name: bottlenecks
fields.label: What are the main bottlenecks or things holding you back from becoming the best version of yourself?

fields.name: peak_mental_time
fields.label: When do you feel most mentally sharp?

fields.name: wearable_device
fields.label: Are you a wearable user? (Apple Watch, Whoop, Oura, etc.)
fields.helper: Answer N/A if you do not use any

sections.on_submit: POST to /api/registrations — show thank_you_screen on success

sections.description: Replaces the form after successful submission. Same page, no redirect.
sections.content: Thank you for your interest in FlowState. We've received your registration and will review it shortly. You'll hear from us via email once your spot is confirmed.

users.description: BetterAuth-managed. One row per user (client or coach).

registrations.description: Raw registration form submissions. Pending until coach approves. On approval, a users row and clients row are created from this data.

clients.description: Active client profiles. Created from registrations on coach approval. Single source of truth for all automation.

columns.user_id: uuid REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
columns.program_end_date: date GENERATED ALWAYS AS (program_start_date + INTERVAL '90 days') STORED

program_phases.description: Master weekly protocol targets for all 12 weeks. Seeded once at setup.

check_ins.description: Every check-in submitted via Discord. Written by backend after bot receives photo and AI analysis completes.

columns.client_id: uuid REFERENCES clients(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

calendar_events.description: Per-client calendar. Auto-populated by cron jobs. Drives the calendar view in the Affine portal.

columns.client_id: uuid REFERENCES clients(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
columns.title: text NOT NULL

interventions.description: Intervention queue. System auto-creates when alert conditions trigger. Coach reviews, approves, bot delivers.

columns.client_id: uuid REFERENCES clients(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

intervention_templates.description: Reusable intervention message templates. System selects based on trigger, personalises via Groq.

seed_data.name: Morning Exercise Slipping
seed_data.message_template: Hey {{name}}, I noticed morning exercise has been tough this week ({{adherence}}% adherence). Let's talk about what's getting in the way — is it energy, timing, or motivation?

seed_data.name: 2 Missed Check-Ins
seed_data.message_template: Hey {{name}}, just checking in — missed your last two check-ins. Everything okay? Drop a quick reply when you get a chance.

seed_data.name: 3+ Missed Check-Ins
seed_data.message_template: {{name}}, it's been {{days}} days since your last check-in. I want to make sure you're supported — reply here or let me know if you need to pause.

seed_data.name: Weekly Adherence Drop
seed_data.message_template: Weekly check — you're at {{adherence}}% this week. The data shows {{weakness}} is the main gap. Here's a simplified protocol for the next 3 days...

seed_data.name: Phase Transition
seed_data.message_template: You're entering Week {{week}} — here's what changes: wake time moves to {{wake_time}}, caffeine cutoff tightens to {{caffeine_cutoff}}. Your portal has been updated with your new targets.

seed_data.name: Sleep Quality Declining
seed_data.message_template: Your sleep scores have been {{avg_score}} the past few days. A couple of things to check: post-exercise temperature, screen time after 9pm, and your caffeine cutoff.

seed_data.name: Peak Window Not Shifting
seed_data.message_template: After {{weeks}} weeks, your peak is still around {{current_peak}} rather than {{target_peak}}. Let's review morning light adherence — that's usually the lever.

seed_data.name: Week 2 Milestone
seed_data.message_template: Week 2 check — time to log your 7-day sleep diary and energy data. Head to your portal to complete the assessment.

seed_data.name: Week 4 Full Review
seed_data.message_template: Week 4 review — you've been on protocol for a month. Let's measure the shift. Please complete the assessment in your portal.

seed_data.name: 7-Day Streak
seed_data.message_template: Excellent — 7-day adherence at {{adherence}}%. Your data shows your peak window moving earlier by {{minutes}} minutes. Keep this up through the weekend.

weekly_summaries.description: Auto-generated every Sunday via Claude Sonnet. Coach reviews Monday.

columns.client_id: uuid REFERENCES clients(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
uuid REFERENCES clients(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

notifications.description: In-portal notification log for both coach and client.

columns.user_id: uuid REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
columns.title: text NOT NULL

affine_fork.strategy: Fork → strip → add BetterAuth + data bridge → deploy as UI shell only

add: BetterAuth JWT session integration — replace Affine auth context
Data bridge layer — all page/DB reads and writes go to backend API
Role-based workspace routing — coach → coach workspace, client → own workspace only

public.description: Receives landing page form submission. Creates registrations row with status=pending. Notifies coach.

auth.description: Client sets new password on first login — clears must_change_password flag

registrations.description: Coach approves — triggers full auto-provision pipeline
Coach rejects — sends rejection email to applicant

dashboard.description: All clients with adherence, flags, last check-in — sorted by adherence ascending
Own KPIs, this week targets, recent check-ins, upcoming calendar events

bot_internal.description: Called only by Discord bot using BOT_INTERNAL_API_TOKEN header.

steps.action: Generate temporary password (12 chars, mixed case + numbers)
Create users row with role=client, must_change_password=true
Create clients row from registration data, Week 1 targets from program_phases, chronotype=Intermediate
Bot: create Discord role client-{id}, create private channel checkin-{name}-{id} under FLOWSTATE-CLIENTS category
Write discord_channel_id back to clients row
Create Affine workspace for client, seed all workspace pages, write affine_workspace_id to clients row
Seed calendar_events for first 7 days based on client.checkin_time_am and checkin_time_pm
Send welcome email via Resend: portal URL, email as username, temporary password, Discord server invite link
Update registrations.status = approved
Create notification for coach: client provisioned and active

events.guildMemberAdd: When client joins server via invite link: GET /api/bot/client-by-discord-id/:discordUserId → assign their role client-{id} → send welcome DM with portal link

check_in_flow.pm_message:
🌙 Evening Check-In — Week {{program_week}}

Hey {{name}}! End of day:
• Energy today (1–10)?
• Focus blocks completed?
• Anything blocking tomorrow?

Optional: attach wearable screenshot 📊
on_photo_received: Upload photo to Cloudflare R2 — get URL
Call Gemini Flash Vision with photo + ai_analysis_prompt
Post AI feedback as reply in channel

discord_bot.ai_analysis_prompt:
You are a performance coach assistant for FlowState.

Client: {{name}}, Week {{program_week}}, Phase: {{phase_name}}.
Chronotype: {{chronotype}}.
Targets: Wake {{wake_time}} | Light {{light_min}}min | Exercise {{exercise_time}} | Caffeine cutoff {{caffeine_cutoff}} | Peak {{peak_window}}
7-day adherence: {{rolling_7d_adherence}}%.

Analyse this {{type}} check-in photo:
1) What you observe relevant to their protocol
2) Whether it aligns with their Week {{program_week}} targets
3) One specific, actionable and encouraging note

Max 120 words. Reference actual targets.

jobs.name: checkin_reminder_am
jobs.description: Find clients whose checkin_time_am is in this 15-min window. POST AM reminder to their Discord channel.

jobs.name: missed_checkin_detector
jobs.description: Hourly. Find expected check-ins that never arrived. Increment consecutive_missed_checkins. Mark calendar events missed. Trigger alert pipeline.

jobs.name: phase_transition_check
jobs.description: Midnight. Recalculate program_week per client. If changed, update targets from program_phases, queue INT-05 intervention, create phase_transition calendar event.

jobs.name: weekly_summary_generator
jobs.description: Sunday 1am. Aggregate each client's week. Call Claude Sonnet for narrative. Insert weekly_summaries row. Notify coach.

jobs.name: alert_pipeline
jobs.description: Recalculate rolling_7d_adherence. If <80% or consecutive_missed >=2: select template, call Groq to personalise draft, insert intervention, set intervention_flag=true, notify coach.

jobs.name: milestone_trigger
jobs.description: Daily 8am. Check clients at weeks 2/4/6/8/12 with no milestone record yet. Queue assessment intervention. Create milestone calendar event.

jobs.name: calendar_hydrator
jobs.description: Monday midnight. Pre-populate the week's check-in calendar events for all active clients.

templates.subject: You're in — here's how to get started with FlowState

phase_0.name: Schema & Seed Data
phase_0.prompt: Using PRD.json as the source of truth, generate two files: (1) schema.sql — CREATE TABLE statements for all tables in database_schema including the registrations table, with all constraints, foreign keys, and indexes. (2) seed.sql — INSERT statements for all rows in program_phases.seed_data and intervention_templates.seed_data.

phase_1.name: Landing Page
phase_1.prompt: Using PRD.json landing_page section, build a Next.js + Tailwind landing page at the root route /. It must include all sections defined in landing_page.sections: hero, about, program_overview, how_it_works, and a registration form. The registration form posts to POST /api/registrations (backend API at NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL). On successful submission replace the form with the thank_you_screen content. All form fields defined in landing_page.sections.registration_form.fields must be present with correct types and validation. No auth required on this page.

phase_2.name: Affine Fork — Strip & Brand
phase_2.prompt: Fork the Affine repository (github.com/toeverything/AFFiNE). Remove all packages in affine_fork.strip.remove. Disable all features in affine_fork.strip.disable. Keep everything in affine_fork.strip.keep. Then: (1) Integrate BetterAuth JWT — replace Affine auth context, redirect to /login if no valid session. (2) Add data bridge layer — all page and database reads/writes route to NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL. (3) Add role-based workspace routing — role=coach loads coach_workspace_pages, role=client loads their own client_workspace_pages only, no cross-access. (4) Apply FlowState branding. Must run with npm run dev and build with npm run build without errors.

phase_3.name: Backend API
phase_3.prompt: Using PRD.json, implement the backend using Hono + TypeScript + @neondatabase/serverless + BetterAuth. Implement all endpoints in api_endpoints including the public POST /api/registrations endpoint and all bot_internal endpoints (protected by BOT_INTERNAL_API_TOKEN header, not BetterAuth). Implement the auto_provision_pipeline as a function called when PATCH /api/registrations/:id/approve is hit. Implement all 8 cron jobs from automation_jobs using node-cron. Implement alert_pipeline as a callable function. Use Resend for all emails defined in email_templates. Use Groq for intervention draft personalisation. Use Claude Sonnet for weekly summary generation.

phase_4.name: Discord Bot
phase_4.prompt: Using PRD.json discord_bot section, implement the Discord bot using Discord.js v14. Must: (1) Register all slash_commands as guild commands for instant availability. (2) On guildMemberAdd: call GET /api/bot/client-by-discord-id/:discordUserId, assign role, send welcome DM. (3) Send AM/PM reminders by polling backend for due reminders every 15 minutes. (4) On photo received in client channel: identify client, upload to R2, call Gemini Flash Vision with ai_analysis_prompt, POST to /api/bot/checkin, reply with feedback, add reactions. (5) Poll GET /api/bot/pending-deliveries every 60s, deliver approved interventions, confirm via PATCH /api/bot/delivered/:id. (6) Handle missed check-ins as defined in check_in_flow.

phase_5.name: Coach & Client Workspace Pages
phase_5.prompt: Using PRD.json affine_fork.workspace_structure, implement all workspace pages inside the stripped Affine shell. Coach pages: Master Dashboard (all clients grid, red/yellow/green adherence colouring, sorted worst first), Pending Registrations (approve/reject with editable start date), Intervention Queue (approve/edit/dismiss), All Clients, Template Library, Weekly Reports. Client pages: Dashboard (KPI tiles, this week targets, last 3 check-ins), Calendar (colour-coded: green=completed, red=missed, grey=scheduled, blue=milestone), Progress (recharts charts for adherence, energy, focus, sleep), Check-In History, Month 1-3 content pages, Tools. All data fetched from API endpoints defined in api_endpoints. Client role cannot access any coach pages.

phase_6.name: Deployment
phase_6.prompt: Using PRD.json stack.deployment and environment_variables sections, generate: (1) railway.json for the backend Hono API service. (2) A separate railway.json for the Discord bot service. (3) vercel.json for the frontend (landing page + Affine portal combined Next.js app). (4) GitHub Actions workflow deploying all three on push to main. (5) .env.example for each of the three services with all keys from environment_variables.
